top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Set to Fall, Brent Surges Past $100: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia were poised to fall after a sharp tech-led selloff on Wall Street, while Brent surged above $100 a barrel for the first time in two months as the escalating Middle East conflict rekindled inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan report finds dramatic jump in AI-themed ETFs — despite rough quarter
top_signals.summary: Wall Street is banking heavily on exchange-traded funds that give investors artificial intelligence exposure, according to JPMorgan Asset Management.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The cooperative spirit at the heart of the digital euro
